info.title: Risk Adjustment Reporting Server Capability Statement
info.description: This profile defines the expected capabilities of a Da Vinci Risk Adjustment Reporting Server when conforming to the Da Vinci Risk Adjustment Implementation Guide for interactions between Reporting Clients and Reporting Servers. Servers are the actors receiving the request for Risk Adjustment Coding Gap Reports for patient(s) and for Risk Adjustmenet Models that are available on the Server. This CapabilityStatement resource includes the complete list of the *recommended* Da Vinci Risk Adjustment profiles and RESTful operations that a Risk Adjustment Reporting Server could support. Servers have the option of choosing from this list based on their local use cases and other contextual requirements.

/metadata.summary: Access to the Server's Capability Statement
/metadata.description: All FHIR Servers return a CapabilityStatement that describes what services they perform

/MeasureReport.summary: Manager for resources of type MeasureReport
/MeasureReport.description: The Manager for resources of type MeasureReport: provides services to manage the collection of all the MeasureReport instances

get.summary: Search all resources of type MeasureReport based on a set of criteria

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date of the measure report

parameters.name: evaluatedResource
parameters.description: An evaluated resource referenced by the measure report

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: External identifier of the measure report to be returned

parameters.name: measure
parameters.description: The measure to return measure report results for

parameters.name: patient
parameters.description: The identity of a patient to search for individual measure report results for

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: The period of the measure report

parameters.name: reporter
parameters.description: The reporter to return measure report results for

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The status of the measure report

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: The identity of a subject to search for individual measure report results for

parameters.name: measurereport-category
parameters.description: Search based on the measurereport-category extension

requestBody.description: The new state of the resource

200.description: the resource being returned after being updated

count.description: The maximum number of search results on a page. The server is not bound to return the number requested, but cannot return more
